name: Bug Triage
desc: Reproduce, debug, and fix a reported bug with regression tests

state.roleSelectValue: QA Tester (automated testing, edge cases, regression suites)

nodes.target: the reported bug and related code
nodes.details: Identify the affected module, function, and code paths. Use ${bugDescription} as the starting point.

then.details: Trace the execution path, identify the exact line/logic causing the issue
Apply a minimal, targeted fix — do not refactor unrelated code
Verify the bug is fixed; test related paths to prevent regression

else.details: Record steps attempted, environment details, and reasons it could not be reproduced

nodes.prompt: Bug fix verified — ready to deploy?
nodes.onReject: Continue debugging or request more information
